location: Guaranteed drop from a Rotten Duelist enemy stationed among stone coffins west of the Consecrated Snowfield grace.
tactics: From the Consecrated Snowfield grace, head west into the blizzard toward a cluster of stone coffins/graves; the Rotten Duelist ambushes from among them.
The Duelist wields a hammer in each hand and hits hard — its scarlet rot-infused strikes can build rot on you quickly if you trade blows carelessly.
It's a guaranteed drop, so you only need to win the fight once.
lore: The same crude iron gladiator's hammer as the standard Battle Hammer, left to fester with scarlet rot. Still heavy enough to crush armor and body alike — now with a rotting bite behind every blow.

builds.name: Strength build with innate Scarlet Rot
builds.why: Same C-scaling Strength as the standard Battle Hammer, but its innate Scarlet Rot buildup adds a damage-over-time layer without needing a separate rot weapon or Arcane investment.
